calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Judgment In Conformity Therewith
Off Calendar Oct-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Diana Fung, Esq. (415-247-7900) of Wood Robinson LLP for Plaintiff/Petitioner/Moving party through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER BOLOGNA ACCOUNTANCY CORPORATION, EMILY GRIFFIN's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Judgment In Conformity Therewith.

Petitioners Bologna Accountancy Corporation and Emily Griffin's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in Open Court. (see scanned order and judgment for details)Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian, CSR No:12355, email: lgillian@sftc.org. (D302)
